name: Cloudflare
description: Cloudflare — CDN / Edge / Acceleration tool for developers

seo.title: Cloudflare Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Cloudflare analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CDN / Edge / Acceleration.

lock_in.explanation: Medium — Workers/R2/D1/KV = deep binding to ecosystem, but DNS andand growth

when_to_use: CDN + edge compute + DNS + security in one
when_not_to_use: Need full PaaS for backend apps — use Railway/Render
Workers have cold start and memory limits
Need managed databases beyond D1 (early stage)

migration_cheatsheet.risk_notes: Medium — Workers/R2/D1/KV = deep binding to ecosystem, but DNS andand growth
migration_cheatsheet.tip: Moderate effort required. Export data before canceling

review.verdict: Best for cdn + edge compute + dns + security in one. Cloudflare offers freemium, paid from $20/mo (Pro). Moderate vendor lock-in.
pros: CDN + edge compute + DNS + security in one
Global edge network for low-latency delivery
cons: Need full PaaS for backend apps
Workers have cold start and memory limits
Proprietary edge functions create platform dependency
review.best_for: CDN + edge compute + DNS + security in one
review.not_for: Need full PaaS for backend apps
